testcase.name: test_past_monthly_catchup
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_recurring.py:161: in test_past_monthly_catchup assert len(linked) == rule["posted_count"] E assert 0 == 4 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_lazy_on_expenses_get

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected lazy auto-post on GET /expenses assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_recurring.py:292: in test_lazy_on_expenses_get assert len(linked) >= 1, "Expected lazy auto-post on GET /expenses" E AssertionError: Expected lazy auto-post on GET /expenses E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])
